CREATE TABLE test_values (id UInt32, value1 Int64, value2 Int64);
SELECT id, bitHammingDistance(value1, value2) FROM test_values;
WITH (SELECT value1 FROM test_values WHERE id = 2) AS val1, (SELECT value2 FROM test_values WHERE id = 2) AS val2 SELECT bitHammingDistance(val1, val2);
SELECT COUNT(*), bitHammingDistance(value1, value2) AS hamming_dist FROM test_values GROUP BY hamming_dist;
CREATE TABLE bit_comparison AS SELECT value1, value2, bitHammingDistance(value1, value2) AS distance FROM test_values;
SELECT distance FROM bit_comparison WHERE distance > 5;
WITH t AS (SELECT value1 AS first_val, value2 AS second_val FROM test_values WHERE id = 3) SELECT bitHammingDistance(first_val, second_val) FROM t;
SELECT bitHammingDistance((SELECT MIN(value1) FROM test_values), (SELECT MAX(value2) FROM test_values));
CREATE TABLE nested_test AS SELECT id, bitHammingDistance(value1, (SELECT MAX(value2) FROM test_values)) AS distance FROM test_values;
